message:
Command `
# 241m CPU / ~64m elapsed. Running normally.
# DRT for large designs can take 6-16 hours of wall clock time.
# Let's go for a 12h sleep
sleep 43200
echo "=== POST-12h MAJOR CHECK $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
echo "=="
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -60 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
tail -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FLOW COMPLETE!" || echo "Not complete"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
` executed with exit code -1.

sleep 43200

echo "=="

wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -60 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# 241m CPU / ~64m elapsed. Running normally.
# DRT for large designs can take 6-16 hours of wall clock time.
# Let's go for a 12h sleep
sleep 43200
echo "=== POST-12h MAJOR CHECK $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
echo "=="
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -60 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
tail -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FLOW COMPLETE!" || echo "Not complete"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
" timed out
